page_content:
# Chapter: General  
## Section 31: Wife’s legal position during continuance of order
So long as any such order of protection
remains in force the wife shall be and be deemed to have been, during such desertion of her, in the like position in all respects, with regard to property and contracts and suing and being sued, as she
would be under this Act if she obtained a decree of judicial separation.  
---
